noAssistantsAssigned.needAssistantsDescription: Assistants are required to make calls. Each assistant comes with scripts and voices that determine how your calls will be handled. Contact your administrator to get started.

noAssistantsAvailable.callsDescription: You need an assistant to view calls. Request a new assistant and an administrator will review and assign it to your account.

create.title: Create New Assistant
create.description: Build a custom AI voice assistant for your business.

edit.title: Edit Assistant
edit.autoSyncDescription: ✨ Auto-Sync: This script will automatically sync to Vapi when you save! The content becomes your assistant's system prompt.
edit.scriptContentNote: This content will be used as the system prompt for your AI assistant in Vapi.
edit.firstMessagePlaceholder: What should the assistant say when the call starts? (e.g., 'Hello! How can I help you today?')
edit.firstMessageDescription: This is the greeting message your assistant will say at the start of each call.
edit.voiceSelectionDescription: 🎤 Voice Selection: Choose from real Vapi voices (11Labs).
edit.name: Name:
edit.previewNote: Click the button to hear a live preview of this voice
edit.editAssistantDescription: Update name, greeting, script, and voice in one place. You can also preview the selected voice.
edit.scriptPlaceholder: Type your script content or system prompt here...
edit.scriptTip: Tip: You can also switch to file upload if you have documents ready
edit.fileUploadTip: Supported: PDF, DOCX, TXT, ZIP files (max 5MB each)
edit.noVoicesFound: No voices found with the selected filters

delete.title: Delete Assistant
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? This action cannot be undone.

validation.scriptContentRequired: System Prompt / Script Content is required

card.selectAssistantDescription: Choose an assistant from the list on the left to view its detailed information, scripts, and voice settings.

request.pendingApproval: Your request is pending admin approval. You'll be notified once it's processed.

request.phoneRequestNotification: You will be notified when your phone number is ready to use.
request.requestNewDescription: Submit a request for a new assistant. An admin will review and create it for you. Provide as much detail as possible to help the admin configure it correctly.
request.editRequestDescription: Update your assistant request details while it's still pending review.
request.firstMessageDescription: This is what the assistant will say when starting a call
request.firstMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Hello! Thank you for calling. How can I assist you today?
request.scriptContentDescription: Describe how the assistant should behave and respond. This is the system prompt that guides the AI.
request.scriptContentPlaceholder: e.g., You are a helpful sales assistant. Your goal is to understand the customer's needs and guide them to the best solution...
request.voicePreferenceDescription: Admin will select the closest matching voice from available options
request.useCasePlaceholder: Describe how you plan to use this assistant...
request.submitSuccessDescription: Your request has been sent to our admin team. We'll notify you once your assistant is ready.
request.adminReviewMessage: Your request will be reviewed by an admin. You'll receive a notification once it's approved and the assistant is ready to use.
request.needActiveBundle: You need an active minute bundle to request an assistant. Please purchase a minute package first.
request.purchaseBundlePrompt: Go to Billing to purchase a minute package and unlock this feature.
request.assistantNameDescription: Give your assistant a clear, descriptive name so your team knows what it does.
request.typeDescription: Choose whether this assistant will handle inbound calls, outbound calls, or both.
request.languageDescription: Select the primary language your assistant should speak on calls.
request.descriptionOptional: Optional: Add any extra context or notes that will help the admin configure this assistant.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Manage reusable contracts, offers, NDAs, and invoice layouts.

create.title: Create Template
create.description: Build reusable contract, offer, NDA, or invoice templates with dynamic variables.

content.title: Template Content
content.description: Use {syntax} syntax to insert dynamic variables.
content.placeholder:
Dear {{customer_name}},

This agreement is made on {{date}} between {{company_name}} ("Company") and {{customer_name}} ("Client").

1. SERVICES
   The Company agrees to provide the following services:
   {{services_description}}

2. COMPENSATION
   The Client agrees to pay {{contract_amount}} for the services described above.

3. TERMS AND CONDITIONS
   This agreement shall remain in effect for {{contract_duration}}.

Signed by:
_________________________
{{signer_name}}
Date: {{date}}
